title: Wet/Dry Snow 2016-present (raster 60 m), Europe, daily
description: The Wet/Dry Snow (WDS) product is generated in near real-time at European scale based on C-band SAR satellite data from the Sentinel-1 constellation within the fractional snow cover on top of canopy (FSCTOC) derived from overlapping optical satellite data from the Sentinel-2 constellation. The product provides the snow state condition (wet / dry) for surfaces covered by snow (FSCTOC >= 60%) for non-forested land areas with a spatial resolution of 60 m x 60 m.

links.title: Legal notice on the use of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data
Homepage of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits

SSC.title: Snow State Classification
SSC.description: Snow State Classification (wet/dry) within the Sentinel-2 top-of-canopy fractional snow cover product (FSCTOC layer from the HR-WSI FSC product, aggregated at 60m, FSCTOCagg)

classification:classes.name: wet_snow
classification:classes.description: Wet snow detected by Sentinel-1 on pixels where FSCTOCagg >= 60%

classification:classes.name: dry_snow
classification:classes.description: Dry snow on pixels where FSCTOCagg >= 60% - no wet snow detected by Sentinel-1

classification:classes.name: snowfree_patchy_snow
classification:classes.description: Snowfree or patchy snow (pixels where 0 <= FSCTOCagg < 60%)

classification:classes.name: cloud
classification:classes.description: Cloud or cloud shadow (masked, from FSCTOCagg = cloud)

SSC-QA.title: Quality layer for the snow state classification (SSC) layer
SSC-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the snow state classification layer.
